name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America offers payday loans ($100-$500), installment loans up to $1,000, and title loans up to $25,000 with same-day funding at physical locations and online.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender that has served millions of consumers seeking quick access to cash. The company operates physical store locations across multiple states, including the Jacksonville, FL location at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave., which serves the North Edgewood and Commonwealth Village areas west of downtown. They position themselves as a fully accredited company providing first-rate customer service to people with immediate financial needs.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans ($100-$500 available online or in-store for 2-4 week terms), Installment Loans ($100-$1,000 with multiple payment options and longer repayment terms than payday loans), and Title Loans ($2,000-$25,000 using vehicle equity as collateral, offered in partnership with LoanCenter). All loans can be obtained through in-store visits or online applications. The Jacksonville location is open Monday-Friday 10am-6pm, Saturday 9am-4pm, with extended hours on Monday and Friday starting at 9am.

Advance America distinguishes itself through high customer satisfaction ratings (4.9 out of 5 stars based on 125,497 Google reviews), bilingual services (Spanish-language support), and multiple access channels (online, in-store, phone pre-qualification). The company also offers Western Union services at their locations. Their application process is straightforward, requiring government-issued ID, proof of income, a checking account, and Social Security Number or ITIN.

As an emergency cash lender, Advance America serves consumers with immediate liquidity needs but operates in a highly regulated sector with inherent concerns about cost of borrowing. While the company emphasizes speed and accessibility, consumers should understand that payday and title loans typically carry significantly higher APRs than traditional personal loans or credit products, making them suitable primarily for genuine short-term emergencies rather than ongoing financial solutions.
pros: Same-day loan funding available for payday and installment loans
High customer satisfaction with 4.9/5 star rating across 125,497 reviews
Offers title loans up to $25,000, providing larger loan amounts than payday-only lenders
Multiple application channels: online, in-store, and phone pre-qualification
Longer repayment terms for installment loans compared to standard payday products
Western Union services available at physical locations
cons: Payday loans limited to $100-$500, requiring customers to seek installment or title loans for larger needs
Title loans require vehicle ownership and paid-off status, creating barriers for customers without qualifying collateral
Website does not disclose APR or cost information, making it difficult to compare true borrowing costs upfront
Installment loans still carry typical short-term lending costs not transparent on the product pages
Limited store hours (closes at 4pm on Saturday, closed Sundays) may inconvenience some borrowers
best_for: Consumers needing $100-$1,000 in emergency cash between paychecks with stable income
Vehicle owners seeking larger loans ($2,000-$25,000) against paid-off car titles
Spanish-speaking borrowers in the Jacksonville area seeking bilingual loan services
People unable to qualify for traditional bank loans and needing same-day funding
diagnosis: Advance America is best for consumers in immediate financial distress who need $100-$25,000 within 24 hours and have steady income or vehicle collateral. The primary caveat is that emergency cash loans carry substantially higher costs than traditional lending products—consumers should only use these services for genuine emergencies and must understand the true cost of borrowing before committing, as APR and fee information is not prominently displayed on the website.
services: Same-day funding for payday and installment loans
Multiple payment plan options for installment products

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
